extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters involving the Company, subsidiaries, Directors, and matters by Directors. For proceedings against the relevant parties, I counted criminal cases as 2 against the Company plus 0 against subsidiaries plus 1 against Directors = 3; statutory/regulatory actions as 6 against the Company plus 3 against subsidiaries plus Nil against Directors = 9; and tax proceedings as 4 involving the Company plus 5 involving subsidiaries = 9. I excluded all “By our Directors” rows and excluded Directors’ civil and personal tax amounts from the aggregate group amount; the quantified Company/subsidiary components are ₹72.79 million criminal, ₹1,057.04 million Company tax, and ₹32.84 million subsidiary tax, totaling ₹1,162.67 million, or ₹116.267 crore, while regulatory and other civil amounts are not quantifiable. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated ₹957.40 million as of March 31, 2021, converted to ₹95.74 crore; no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed, and the segment/denominator issue therefore does not arise.
